About

A CV is a little formal so I also have this about page. Hi! I’m Jake, known in some circles at Fawltea or the devops goblin. Currnetly I work for Seccl as a devops engineer. I enjoy making things, breaking the things I make and then making better things.

Some things you can exspect from me and this blog. I am a big supporter of privicy based aplications (Think signal, Telegram and duckduckgo). My mis-adventures in and around Cardiff. Oppinions on the latest news and tech that I find intresteing, some photograpth somthings and project code that I think is worth shareing.
